Search Criteria

To search for reports that match either of two or more terms add a + between your search words. Spaces between words act like an "AND" search when looking for two or more criteria.

Responsible Use of this Data: Be advised of responsible use of this data from the FDA summarized here from the OpenFDA website - "Adverse event reports submitted to FDA do not undergo extensive validation or verification. Therefore, a causal relationship cannot be established between product and reactions listed in a report. While a suspected relationship may exist, it is not medically validated and should not be the sole source of information for clinical decision making or other assumptions about the safety or efficacy of a product.Additionally, it is important to remember that adverse event reports represent a small percentage of total usage numbers of a product. Common products may have a higher number of adverse events due to the higher total number of people using the product. In recent years the FDA has undertaken efforts to increase collection of adverse events. Increases in the total number of adverse events is likely caused by improved reporting." This application does not always display all available fields. We have selected certain fields to display. Fields may display blank. Where this occurs no data was returned in the API query. We highly encourage you to read API specifications, data limitations and warnings carefully. This application is in no way affiliated with the openFDA project, any of the sources it links to, or the FDA. NOT FOR CLINICAL USE!!

CHPL data is blended with additional ONC and Medicare open public use datasets which are outlined on the about page. This data is for research purposes only and not to be utilized for organizational decision making.
